title: Working on a Project Together 合作做项目
scene: Amy和Peter一起动手做一个科学实验模型。

lines.en: Peter, did you bring the cardboard and glue?
lines.zh: Peter，你带硬纸板和胶水了吗？

lines.en: Yes, I have everything in my bag. What are we building?
lines.zh: 带了，都在我包里。我们要做什么？

lines.en: A model of the solar system for science class.
Cool! How many planets do we need to make?
lines.zh: 酷！我们需要做几个星球？

lines.en: Eight planets. You make the big ones.
OK, I will make Jupiter and Saturn.
lines.zh: 好的，我来做木星和土星。

lines.en: I will paint the sun. Pass me the yellow paint.
lines.zh: 我来画太阳。把黄色颜料给我。

lines.en: Here you go. Should I use the scissors now?
Yes. Be careful with the scissors. Let me help you.
This looks amazing! We will get an A for sure!
lines.zh: 这看起来太棒了！我们肯定会得A！
